title: Modelling Long Balloons, 100 pcs Purple Magic Balloons, Modelling Balloon Kit, Long Balloon for Creative Fun, for Arch Birthday Wedding Clown Decoration Christmas Party
features: 【Package Includes】You will receive 100 magic balloons. A super large quantity can be used for party decorations. A variety of colors are available to meet your different decoration needs

【High Quality Material】Classic long balloons made of high-quality latex and have good ductility. Strong and durable, very flexible. A little talcum powder is included to prevent the balloons from sticking together, No mess

【Improve Creativity and Coordination】The modelling long balloons offer good stretchability. Children will love inflating the balloons and incorporating them into many different shapes and animals, such as dogs, swords and guns, crowns, flowers, clowns, snakes, rabbits, chickens, etc

【Product Size】The modelling long balloons are 30 cm long before inflation. Due to their good elasticity, they can be stretched to 100 cm, which is long enough for creating various balloon shapes. Please note that a 10 cm gap should be reserved when inflating, which can prevent balloons from exploding

【Application Occasions】Long balloons are suitable for most occasions such as parties and celebrations. Surprise people with these modelling balloons at parties, celebrations, and events, or use them for birthdays, engagements, weddings, and other special occasions
description: Product Description The long balloon can be rotated and folded in different interesting shapes, e.g. flowers, grapes, various animals and so on. They can be used to decorate birthday parties, weddings, anniversaries, Christmas parties and baby showers and provide interesting toys and photo booth props for children and adults. Magic balloons suitable for most occasions such as parties and celebrations. Surprise with the modelling balloons at parties, celebrations, events or use them for birthdays, engagements, weddings, parties. Long malleable balloons made of durable latex material, with certain thickness, not easy to break. You can use them with confidence. Our long malleable blue balloons can match different balloons in other shapes and colours to make different balloon animals, flowers or other shapes. Balloon craft brings you a lot of fun on DIY and also develops your creativity and imagination a lot. Specification: Material: Latex Color Blue/Red/Pink/Orange/Tiffany Blue/White/Black/Purple/Purple/Grass Green/Christmas Green Quantity Pack of 100 balloon size The natural length is approx. 30 cm. It can be used after Inflate 100 cm. Package includes: 100 x modelling balloons Warm tips: 1. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Children should play with balloons under adult supervision. 2. The powder in the packaging is talc, which prevents the balloons from sticking together. 3. Due to the difference between different monitors, there may be slight colour differences. 4. Please use a balloon pump. Please do not inflate the air too much and avoid closeness to overheating and too sharp objects. You need to leave some space to form the shape.
